name: USS SC-661 (SC-661)
events: 28 Aug 1944 USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS John D. Edwards (Lt. R.A. Norelius, USNR), USS Mallard (T/Lt. B.L. Maddox, USN), USS SC-654 (Lt.(jg) R. Engelman, USNR) and USS SC-661 (Lt.(jg). R.D. Holsclaw, USNR).
